assertions.title: Redacted areas are solid black with no visible text

steps.action: Process output-b-input.pdf in Identity mode and inspect rendered output page content
steps.expected: REDACT entities are covered by solid black polygons with no text bleed-through
steps.observed: SSN and email regions were rendered as uniform black bars; no underlying characters were visible in the zoomed evidence

assertions.title: PDF metadata stripped to minimal values

steps.expected: No original author/title/subject/keywords persist; only minimal non-identifying metadata remains
steps.observed: Input metadata (/Author, /Subject, /Keywords, /Creator) was absent in output; output metadata contained only /Producer jsPDF 2.5.2, /Title Redacted Document, and /CreationDate

assertions.title: Multi-page document has all pages in output

steps.action: Download redacted output from a 3-page input and verify page count
steps.expected: Output page count matches input and retains first/middle/last pages
steps.observed: Input and output both had 3 pages (pypdf analysis); first, middle, and last page renders were present

steps.action: Inspect content/redaction placement on each output page
steps.expected: Redactions appear on correct corresponding pages
steps.observed: Page 1 redacted SSN/email, page 2 redacted phone/address, page 3 redacted EIN/routing/account; sensitive fields matched source page context

assertions.title: KEEP entities remain visible and legible in output

steps.action: Run flow in default Identity mode and inspect output content
steps.expected: Dollar amounts (KEEP) remain legible while identity PII is blacked out in same output
steps.observed: On output page 1, Salary $5,432.10 remained legible while SSN and email were blacked out; same mixed-state behavior also visible on pages 2-3 (Bonus/Net Pay visible with PII redacted)

steps.action: Compare input and output page dimensions using PDF media boxes
steps.expected: Output dimensions match input exactly with no crop/stretch/resize
steps.observed: All input pages were 612x792 pt (letter) and all output pages were 612x792 pt; dimensions matched exactly

frictions.description: Headless browser downloads were saved under UUID filenames without extension instead of preserving the target filename directly in the filesystem.
frictions.resolution: Copied the latest downloaded artifact to ui/output-b/output-b-input-redacted.pdf for deterministic evidence analysis.

frictions.description: Native PDF properties panel is not available in headless automation for metadata inspection screenshots.
frictions.resolution: Used pypdf metadata extraction and captured a rendered comparison report screenshot as evidence.

summary: Tested 5 assertions (VAL-OUT-005..009): all 5 passed. Output redactions were opaque black, metadata was reduced, multi-page output matched input page count/content, KEEP money values remained legible in Identity mode, and output dimensions matched input exactly.
